# Krizaka — Orasaka

> Krizaka is a Québec-based startup building Orasaka, an open-source sovereign AI
> orchestration engine. Java 21, Spring Boot 3.5, Spring AI, hexagonal architecture
> enforced by ArchUnit, a 15-interceptor cognitive pipeline, and multimodal inference
> (chat, image, video, voice) running entirely on-premise. Designed to facilitate
> compliance with Québec's Law 25, GDPR and PIPEDA: data never leaves your network.

## Editions

- Orasaka Community: complete open-source, self-hosted, free forever.
- Orasaka Cloud (2026, waitlist): white-label deployments and one-click Packages
  (pre-configured interceptor bundles forming tailored business solutions).

## Key pages

- Product & docs: https://krizaka.com/products/orasaka
- Getting started (3 commands): https://krizaka.com/get-started
- Cognitive engineering & 15-interceptor pipeline: https://krizaka.com/ingenierie-cognitive
- Editions: https://krizaka.com/editions
- Solutions / Packages: https://krizaka.com/solutions
- Roadmap (generated from the repo, real statuses): https://krizaka.com/roadmap
- Use cases (agencies, sales, legal, support, real estate, healthcare): https://krizaka.com/use-cases
- Demos (real outputs): https://krizaka.com/demos

## Source

- GitHub: https://github.com/krizaka/orasaka

Languages: French (default, Québec) and English.
